headline: Birmingham's trusted emergency plumbers — same-hour dispatch, licensed engineers, insurance-approved repairs, 24/7.
about_text: Aqua Rescue handles burst pipes, blockages, boiler failures and flood emergencies across Birmingham and the West Midlands. Our licensed engineers are on call 24 hours a day, seven days a week — no call-out charge, guaranteed.

services.title: Rapid Water Extraction
services.description: Flood mitigation, emergency drying and structural assessment for homes and businesses across Birmingham.

services.title: Tap & Valve Replacements
services.description: Upgrade to low-leak fixtures and pressure-reducing valves that reduce future maintenance and water bills.

services.title: Public Liability Callouts
services.description: Callout and safety documentation for councils, housing associations and private rental portfolios.

reviews.name: Neil J.
reviews.quote: Aqua Rescue had an engineer at our property within 40 minutes. Burst pipe sorted, no mess left behind.
reviews.body: Called at 2am with a burst pipe flooding our hallway. The Aqua Rescue engineer arrived in under 40 minutes, isolated the leak, repaired the pipe and left everything clean and dry. Outstanding emergency response.

reviews.name: Debbie H.
reviews.quote: Clear pricing, no surprise charges, and the engineer explained everything before starting work.
reviews.body: After a kitchen pipe burst on a Sunday afternoon I was dreading the callout. Aqua Rescue gave me a fixed quote over the phone, stuck to it, and the engineer was professional, clean and efficient throughout.

reviews.name: Tom R.
reviews.quote: Professional engineers, full compliance report on the same day. Exactly what our housing portfolio needed.
reviews.body: As a facilities manager overseeing 60 units, I need contractors I can trust at short notice. Aqua Rescue consistently delivers fast, documented, insurance-approved repairs.

faqs.question: Are your engineers Gas Safe registered and insured?
faqs.answer: Yes — all engineers carry Gas Safe ID and full public liability insurance on every visit.

faqs.question: How quickly can you reach me in Birmingham?
faqs.answer: We aim to arrive within 60 minutes for all confirmed emergency callouts across Birmingham.

faqs.question: Is the repair work guaranteed?
faqs.answer: All repairs carry a minimum 10-year workmanship guarantee — in writing, every time.

differentiators: All engineers are Gas Safe registered, fully identity-checked and carry public liability insurance on every visit.
We guarantee arrival within one hour for all confirmed emergency callouts across Birmingham and the West Midlands.
Every visit includes a complimentary check of your visible pipework, joints and valves — at no extra cost to you.
You receive a written quote before any work starts. The price we quote is the price you pay — no hidden fees, no surprises.
All repairs carry a minimum 10-year workmanship guarantee. If a fault recurs in the warranty period, we return free of charge.
Full post-repair documentation issued for every job — ideal for landlords, letting agents and housing associations.
service_area_text: Birmingham, Solihull, Dudley, Walsall and Wolverhampton.

metadata.title: Aqua Rescue | Birmingham Emergency Plumbers
metadata.description: Aqua Rescue provides 24/7 emergency plumbing across Birmingham, Solihull, Dudley, Walsall and Wolverhampton. Same-hour dispatch, licensed engineers, insurance-approved repairs.
